name: product-foundry
description: A gated, stack-agnostic product discovery, prototype, PRD, go-to-market, and implementation handoff workflow for Codex and Claude Code.

interface.shortDescription: Discover, define, prototype, and hand off an MVP
interface.longDescription: Guides a founder through evidence-backed product discovery, executable prototypes, a traceable PRD, go-to-market planning, and a portable implementation handoff.
defaultPrompt: Run Product Foundry with me from idea through implementation handoff.
Resume the current Product Foundry phase from my docs artifacts.
Implement this approved Product Foundry PRD safely.
